notifications.orderCreated: Your order has been created successfully. Total: {total}. Please proceed to payment.
notifications.orderUpdated: Your order status has been updated to {status}.
notifications.orderPaid: Your payment has been received. We are processing your order.
notifications.orderProcessed: Your order is being prepared for shipment.
notifications.orderProcessFailed: Processing your order failed. Please contact support.

errors.badPreconditions: Cannot update order to status {status} from current status {currentStatus}.
errors.accessDenied: Forbidden access. You do not have permission to access this order.
